Oh, you're on mute.
Always.
Always.

Did you take a long weekend?
Yes, we did have a long weekend.
It was great.

So it was very nice.
That's so fun.

yeah.
I

We're like, should I get this or should I get that?

That's awesome.
We were just chatting about how, and then I will let us get to other things, but we were just chatting.
I found out this past weekend that I have to move all of a sudden.
Just like, you know, it just like takes a year off your life every time.
As someone who just did it, I understand.
Sometimes some are harder than others for sure.
Yeah.

Like, it's not coming with us to the next location.

Like, it's just in New York.
It's, you know, know, you

That'll be exciting, but relieved.
Okay, I saw that Tiago was a maybe, so maybe we can't.
He's in person in SF, so I don't know if he's joining.
I know he actually was with Marcel in y'all's office yesterday.
So I doubt he'll probably be joining, because they probably talked about things.

Yeah.
Okay, cool.
No worries.

All right.
Just share my screen.
So just a quick update.

So we'll have that up too.

I was going to tell you that.
So we've submitted everything to them.
Our goal is to kick off on June 3rd.
They just wrapped up another project.
And then Tiago is finishing up doing a sitemap for them.
So that's where we're at.
So hopefully June 3rd kickoff.
I haven't heard back from the WonderUp team since I submitted everything, but I know they're also still waiting on the sitemap.
So I'm hoping to get that to them either end of day today or early tomorrow.
Yeah.
All right, great.
Yeah, just checking because based on our previous conversation, you know, Tiago wanted a lot of like custom development on the back end.
So obviously,
Once they're on board, we can coordinate with them and then get those pages up.
Regarding the performance this week, our impressions increased, which is good news.
Our clicks slightly decreased, but it's still at a pretty high level, nothing alarming over there.
We seem to go through these phases where we break some eyes and then we sort of come on a little plateau and then it goes up again.
So generally, pretty expected behavior here.
Presence in AI overviews is pretty strong as well.
No major changes there, so I didn't include it over here.
The good news is like the new categories that we had died into, example, for real estate, for finance and e-commerce, they're showing some pretty good signs.
Generally, the click-through rates are pretty high and also the number of impressions are high.
So overall, we're seeing some pretty good signs over there.
So
MLM referrals to the overall website also increased compared to last week.
Generally, what we're seeing there is that the construction block content pages and the task automation in sales pages are receiving the most hits.

We can't really dive in deeper and see which keywords or searches are driving these, but generally, it kind of validates what we've been thinking, which is we've kind of known that these are our best performers, and that seems to be holding up across the LLMs as well.
So any questions I can answer about that?
Any clarifications I can...
No.
Okay.
So coming up next week, we have the 25 blog articles plus the editorial.
I'm just calling them editorial, which is basically the AI agent architecture article because we're spending a little more time on them.
So that's why I'm tagging it as editorial just to make that difference.
we're...
Thank But
Those are scheduled for next week.
Don't expect any pickups over there.

So I'll be presenting that report this time next week.
Basically, it's just going to validate that, okay, everything's been placed.
We haven't seen any signs otherwise, like any cause of concern.
Everything is proceeding as planned.
So generally, no worries over there.

We should have them out soon.
And once that's done, we aim to have three to four posts for Tiago's account and three to four
For the Datagrid account.
And the JTPD site, George is leading.
I think he sent over a list of customers to interview.
I saw that exchange in Slack.
So once that's in, we'll get the interview started, and then we should have Fath going as well.
Yeah, I just realized I'm waiting on the list.
So I just pinged them again.
They said they're going to pull it from Mixpanel right now, and I'll get that over.
Sorry for the delay there.
That's on me.
Thank you.
That was, yeah, go ahead, Mara.
Oh, yeah, just one other thing for the thought leadership.
I know that, like, Ray has visibility.
Is there anything, like, would you prefer to be optional on those calls in any way, Kaitlin?
Would that be helpful to you?
Yeah, it would helpful to give a little context, especially, like, when she has my support on things.
Let me know.
Yeah.
Just so, like, you have a sense of, because I feel like, you
We have a couple of different moving pieces here, and you can always ping if you have any questions whatsoever, but nice to just be able to review someone's calendar.
So, yeah, I'll add you.

We moved it next to next week from today based on a conflict, and then we should just have a weekly recurring from there where we'll do kind of the interview, bounce around topics, and then use that as sort of the fodder for probably the post particular to his account, and then company posts as well.
But also those can be, if there's anything kind of general, sometimes we don't necessarily need like his thoughts on it.
You can just share like, we're doing this and drop it on the channel and we'll turn it into a post.
But we can chat about that in the future, but that's sort of the general flow that we'll follow.
And I am adding you to the socials now.
How it's not pulling your email, so I will grab it from Slack.
Yeah.
Great.
All right.
Any use optional.
Cool.
Okay.
You should have gotten an invite.
Okay, cool.
Sweet.
Awesome.
Good luck with the rest of moving in.
Are you like boxes mostly done or are like?
I am like way too type A and OCD.
Like I was like unpacked day of.
Wasn't organized, but really like super speed and everything.
So it's fine.
Yeah.
I'm like, okay, like the big, like all the big stuff is kind of done and all the big things I've purchased.
I'm just putting little things together.
I'm like.
What?

Yeah.
Yeah.
Yeah.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 478 articles by Saturday, including new AI agent architecture pieces](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [SEO metrics show positive trends: increased impressions, high CTRs in new categories](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [WonderUp agency onboarding set for June 3rd, pending sitemap completion](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Thought leadership content strategy evolving, with Kaitlin now included in planning](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance

  - [478 articles to be published by Saturday, including editorial AI agent architecture pieces](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Impressions increased, clicks slightly decreased but still at high levels](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Strong presence in AI overviews maintained](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [New categories (real estate, finance, e-commerce) showing promising signs with high CTRs and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [LLM referrals to website increased; construction block and task automation in sales pages receiving most hits](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### WonderUp Agency Onboarding

  - [Submitted materials to WonderUp](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Targeting June 3rd kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Tiago finishing sitemap, to be delivered end of day or early tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Custom backend development planned post-onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

### Link Building Update

  - [Month-end approaching, most links expected to be placed](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Report from channel partner due early next week](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [No current causes for concern, proceeding as planned](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### Thought Leadership and Social Media

  - [Posts scheduled through today](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Writer working on next batch for Tiago's approval](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Aim: 3-4 posts each for Tiago's account and Datagrid account](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Kaitlin added to thought leadership planning calls (optional attendance)](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### JTBD Site Progress

  - [George leading; awaiting customer list for interviews](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Kaitlin to provide list pulled from Mixpanel](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete and deliver sitemap to WonderUp (Tiago)](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Finalize next batch of thought leadership posts (Writer → Tiago approval)](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Pull and share customer list for JTBD interviews (Kaitlin)](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Present link building report next week (Vivek)](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Continue content production: 25 blog articles + editorial pieces (Content team)](https://fathom.video/share/oGAjdJJpfDqPmXWvHMuvxf8MMKDPxHh7?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

action_items.description: Send list of customers from Mixpanel for JTPD site interviews to George
